Core Skills & Toolset

✦ Content & Social Media
Social media management, blog writing, SEO copywriting, Canva graphics, CapCut video, community management, 200K+ Facebook Group grown from scratch
✦ Email Marketing
Mailchimp newsletters, email drip sequences, subscriber segmentation, A/B testing subject lines, campaign scheduling and reporting
✦ CRM & Automation
GoHighLevel (GHL) — SMS/email workflows, lead nurturing, appointment booking automation, HubSpot CRM contact management
✦ Paid Advertising
Facebook/Meta Ads — campaign setup, audience targeting, creative assets, conversion optimisation, lead generation at scale
✦ SEO & Keyword Research
On-page SEO, SEMrush Keyword Magic Tool, Google Search Console, first-page Google rankings achieved for Restaurant Superstar blog
✦ Web & Landing Pages
WordPress, Divi, Elementor, Groove Pages — conversion-focused websites, sales funnels, landing page builds and maintenance
✦ Video Editing
CapCut — short-form video editing, captions, effects, UGC-style content. Kling AI for AI-generated UGC video production
✦ AI-Native Tools
ChatGPT, Claude AI, Midjourney, Leonardo AI, Kling AI, Originality AI — all deployed in real production workflows
